Figure 12 is 3.072 MRows/sec × 16 columns = 49.152 Mbps
The audio streams in this Transport Pattern are:
2 channels of 48 kHz × 24 bits (D1 and D2).
4 channels of 24 kHz × 16 bits (D3, D4, D5, and D6).
The SSP Rate in this example is 24 kHz, because the Transport Pattern repeats every 128 Rows.
